The 16,292 master-gradient-null byte indices include parser-essential bytes (PR101 magic header at indices 0-7 + Huffman table headers + FEC6 format metadata + selector_payload) that have ZERO gradient leverage on score (so master-gradient correctly tags them null) but are BIT-ESSENTIAL for archive parser execution. This is the SAME META class as pair #2 falsification but at a DEEPER surface: pair #2 (commit 8e2134edc) broke residual-codec predictor-empirical match at 101x zscore; H3 here breaks inflate parser DIRECTLY (rc=1 in ~1s). REMOVAL paradigm (substitute null-gradient bytes with arbitrary constants reconstructed at inflate) requires substrate-level RESCOPE: future work must SUBSET the 16,292 null-byte set to exclude parser-essential regions before any BUILD investment. Aggregate cascade saved ~-400 LOC of substrate-engineering BUILD investment at /bin/zsh LOCAL macOS-CPU smoke cost.
